title: dolichos argyros
intro: Dolichos argyros, also known as the silver dolichos, is a perennial legume native to Africa and Asia, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce fever, relieve rheumatic pain, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Dolichos argyros include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve kidney function. Herbal preparations of Dolichos argyros can be made by drying the plant's roots, leaves, and seeds, and are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures.
